Ron English archive review

Sculpture Candidate Review

This working page uses a 19-inch threshold plus sculpture/material keywords to identify records that may belong in Sculptures and Installations or Editioned Sculptures. It is for review only and does not move records automatically.

Repository home Sculptures Editioned Sculptures Download CSV
